arts.ttl: Transfer Talk: Chelsea, Tottenham eye Lecce wonderkid Dorgu
arts.sum: Lecce left-back Patrick Dorgu is being tracked by the likes of Chelsea and Tottenham Hotspur. Transfer Talk has the latest.

arts.ttl: Liverpool reclaim top spot as Curtis Jones downs Chelsea after penalty drama - 5 talking points
arts.sum: LIVERPOOL 2-1 CHELSEA: Mohamed Salah's opener was cancelled out by Nicolas Jackson at Anfield, but Curtis Jones restored Liverpool's advantage in a competitive match
